sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n81908" key="peripla/nhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περιπλᾰ´ν-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n81908.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">wandering about</tr_>, ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">520f</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
